description: The evidence that the Earth's climate is changing at unprecedented rates is now overwhelming. Environmental tipping points are being crossed and many species are adapting or failing to adapt. Climate change poses a significant problem for conserving and managing wildlife and their habitats. Climate change and its ecological impacts will be discussed and analyzed.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (Declared in Forest Science or Wildlife Ecology and Junior standing),ZOOLOGY/​BOTANY/​F&W ECOL  460, or graduate/professional standing
